parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "response_engine": {
    "type": "retell-llm",
    "llm_id": "{{ $json.llm_id }}"
  },
  "voice_id": "openai-Marissa",
  "agent_name": "{{ $('Get many rows').item.json.name }}",
  "voice_temperature": 1,
  "voice_speed": 1,
  "volume": 1,
  "responsiveness": 1,
  "interruption_sensitivity": 1,
  "enable_backchannel": true,
  "backchannel_frequency": 0.9,
  "backchannel_words": [
    "yeah",
    "uh-huh"
  ],
  "language": "en-US",
  "normalize_for_speech": true,
  "end_call_after_silence_ms": 60000,
  "max_call_duration_ms": 600000,
  "enable_voicemail_detection": true,
  "voicemail_message": "Hi, please give us a callback.",
  "analysis_summary_prompt": "Summarize the outcome of the conversation in five sentences.",
  "begin_message_delay_ms": 1000
}

={
  "agent_name": "{{ $('Webhook3').item.json.body.name }}",
  "voice_id": "{{ $('Webhook3').item.json.body.voice_id }}",
  "language": "en-US",
  
  "response_engine": {
    "type": "retell-llm",
    "llm_id": "{{ $json.llm_id }}"
  },
  
  "voice_temperature": 1,
  "voice_speed": 1,
  "volume": 1,
  "responsiveness": 1,
  "interruption_sensitivity": 1,
  
  "normalize_for_speech": false,
  
  "end_call_after_silence_ms": 60000,
  "max_call_duration_ms": 600000,
  
  "enable_voicemail_detection": true,
  "voicemail_message": "Hi, please give us a callback.",
  "voicemail_option": {
    "action": {
      "type": "hangup"
    }
  },
  
  "analysis_summary_prompt": "Summarize the outcome of the conversation in five sentences.",
  
  "begin_message_delay_ms": 5000,
  "ring_duration_ms": 9000,
  
  "webhook_url": "https://auto.nsolbpo.com/webhook/calllogs",
  "webhook_timeout_ms": 10000
}

  "voice_id": "{{ $('Webhook3').item.json.body.voice_id }}",

parameters.subject: Activation Code
parameters.html:
= Account Deactivation Code

Account Deactivation

Verification Code Required

You requested to deactivate your account. Use the verification code below to confirm.

{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.record.code }}

⏳ This code expires in 15 minutes.

🔒 Do not share this code with anyone.

If you didn’t request this, please ignore this email or contact support.

© {{ new Date().getFullYear() }} Inbound Genie. All rights reserved.

values.content:
=You are a Lead Qualification Analyst.

Analyze the call transcript and determine whether this call is a LEAD.

A call is a LEAD ("yes") only if the caller clearly shows intent to take next steps, such as:
- requesting a callback, meeting, appointment, demo, or follow-up
- asking to buy a product/service
- asking for pricing/packages/availability with interest
- sharing contact details for future communication

If the caller is only asking general questions, calling for support, not interested, or no intent is shown, return "no".

STRICT RULES:
- Do NOT guess.
- Use ONLY what is explicitly mentioned in the transcript.
- Output must be ONLY "yes" or "no" (lowercase).
- Do not return JSON, explanation, or extra text.
